entities.name: Iron Triangle
entities.context: Triangulation method for human truth in hiring assessment using three disparate contexts

entities.name: Self-reflection
entities.context: One plane of assessment, prone to blind spots bias

entities.name: Interview performance
entities.context: One plane of assessment, prone to performance/charm bias

entities.name: External validation
entities.context: One plane of assessment, prone to networking bias

entities.name: Narrative drift
entities.context: Inconsistency between the three assessment planes that indicates potential false narrative

entities.name: Ground truth
entities.context: Reliable truth indicated by consistency across all three assessment planes

entities.name: Careerspan assessment engine
entities.context: System to be designed to detect narrative drift across assessment planes

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company building the assessment engine

relationships.context: Self-reflection is one of the three planes in the Iron Triangle
Interview performance is one of the three planes in the Iron Triangle
External validation is one of the three planes in the Iron Triangle
Consistency across Iron Triangle planes indicates ground truth
Engine must implement triangulation across three planes
Engine must detect narrative drift to flag inconsistent candidates
Careerspan is building this assessment tool
